summary: Iteration 43: Complete Workforce Coverage System - All 42 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Staff Swaps page with Swap/Drop buttons, Admin Dashboard with Swap Requests and Shift Drops widgets, Shift Scheduler with auto-select staff. Fixed bug: restaurantAPI.getStaff() → staffAPI.getAll() in AdminDashboard.js.

issues: Minor: Recharts console warning about chart dimensions (-1x-1) - cosmetic only

critical_code_review_comments: swap_requests.py: Full 3-step handshake implemented - waiting_acceptance → pending_approval → approved with auto-reassign
swap_requests.py: Drop shift with reason_code (emergency/sickness/unresolved_swap) creates pending drop request
swap_requests.py: Sickness auto-logs to attendance with entry_source='sick_leave'
swap_requests.py: approve-open makes shift is_open=true and blasts notifications to all staff
swap_requests.py: claim endpoint assigns open shift to claimer, prevents claiming own dropped shift
AdminDashboard.js: Fixed bug - changed restaurantAPI.getStaff() to staffAPI.getAll()
AdminDashboard.js: Swap Requests widget shows A ↔ B context with approve/reject buttons
AdminDashboard.js: Shift Drops widget shows Open and Reassign buttons with inline staff picker
StaffSwapRequests.js: Full rewrite with swap/drop/open sections, reason code dropdown
ShiftScheduler.js: openAdd(date, sid) auto-selects correct staff in dialog
seed_data_creation: Test shifts created and cleaned up during pytest runs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 43 verified complete workforce coverage system: (1) Three-Way Handshake Swap: POST /api/swap-requests creates with status=waiting_acceptance, PUT /api/swap-requests/{id}/accept moves to pending_approval, PUT /api/swap-requests/{id}/approve auto-reassigns shift. (2) Drop Shift Escalation: POST /api/shifts/drop with reason_code creates drop request, sickness auto-logs to attendance. (3) Open Shift Marketplace: PUT /api/drop-requests/{id}/approve-open makes shift is_open=true, POST /api/shifts/{id}/claim assigns to claimer (prevents claiming own dropped shift). (4) Admin Dashboard shows Swap Requests and Shift Drops widgets with action buttons. (5) Staff Swaps page has Swap/Drop buttons and Open Shifts section. (6) Shift Scheduler auto-selects staff when clicking + button on a row.

drop_sickness_auto_attendance.evidence: POST /api/shifts/drop with reason_code=sickness creates attendance with entry_source='sick_leave'

drop_emergency_critical_notification.evidence: POST /api/shifts/drop with reason_code=emergency creates CRITICAL notification

claim_open_shift.evidence: POST /api/shifts/{id}/claim assigns shift to claimer, sets is_open=false

claim_own_dropped_rejected.evidence: POST /api/shifts/{id}/claim returns 400 for own dropped shift

staff_swaps_page_buttons.evidence: Staff Swaps page shows 'Request Swap' and 'Drop' buttons

admin_dashboard_swap_widget.evidence: Admin Dashboard shows Swap Requests widget with A ↔ B context

admin_dashboard_drop_widget.evidence: Admin Dashboard shows Shift Drops widget with Open and Reassign buttons

shift_scheduler_auto_select.evidence: Clicking + on staff row pre-selects that staff in dialog

settings_stripe_tab_conditional.evidence: Stripe Payments tab visible when qr_ordering feature enabled

mocked_apis_list: Firebase push notifications (live credentials, but test device tokens are fake)

bug_fixed.fix: Changed restaurantAPI.getStaff() to staffAPI.getAll() and added staffAPI import
